tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: This is a big building. The hospital is in the middle of the city. The temple is very old. The bridge is built over the river. There is a lot of noise in the factory.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: There are many shops in the mall. The tower is very tall. The school building is new. Ants are walking on the ground. Mosquitoes bite at night.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "तिलचट्टा रसोई में छिपा है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The cockroach is hiding in the kitchen.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "The bridge are built over the river."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The bridge is built over the river.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Buildings, Worms & Insects Vocabulary का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The butterfly is sitting on the flower. Bees make honey. The fly sat on the food. Termites eat wood.
